name: Color Escape: VR Coop
short_description: An asymmetric VR game where you will have to cooperate in order to solve puzzles.
detailed_description:
Communication will be your only way out!


Discover a new kind of cooperative puzzle-platformer VR game released yet in a totally new version!

One player is wearing a VR headset while another is controlling the levels on the computer screen, but there's a twist: computer screen are only 2D!

Will you be able to send the correct information from the headset to help them make a bridge for you to the end of each level?

So grab a friend and explore more than fifty levels (including new secret ones) that will defy your understanding of space and challenge your communication skills.

What's inside the game ?

  • Two player asymmetric cooperation with one computer and one VR headset
  • 50+ puzzles to challenge your skills
  • Local record system
